text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Arizona State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? No, I don't have Medicare. I'm not old enough. Thank you.
